title: carinta involucrata
intro: Carinta involucrata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carinta involucrata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to various parts of the body.
